name: savingsrush-mcp
description: Production-ready MCP server for SavingsRush providing tools for users, websites, coupons, and blogs with built-in caching and smart search.

tools.name: list_active_coupon_expert
tools.description: List active verified coupon expert on SavingsRush

tools.name: get_coupon_expert
tools.description: Get coupon expert details by slug

tools.name: get_coupons
tools.description: Get coupons for a specific website URL

prompts.name: find_best_coupons_for_store
prompts.description: Guide the client to fetch and present the best available coupons for a store URL.

arguments.name: goal
arguments.description: Optional savings goal such as 'highest discount' or 'working coupon code'.

prompts.name: recommend_top_stores
prompts.description: Guide the client to review top SavingsRush stores and recommend the most relevant ones.

arguments.name: audience
arguments.description: Optional audience or shopping intent such as 'fashion shoppers' or 'students'.

prompts.name: show_coupon_expert_profile
prompts.description: Guide the client to fetch and present a coupon expert profile by slug.

resources.name: server-about
resources.description: Overview of the SavingsRush MCP server, its purpose, and its supported MCP capabilities.

resources.name: tools-catalog
resources.description: Catalog of available SavingsRush MCP tools with usage guidance.

resources.name: sample-queries
resources.description: Example user requests and the corresponding SavingsRush MCP tools to use.

BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the SavingsRush public API
